narrative:
Commercial Point-East (precinct in Pickaway County) has 808 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
